nasb.text: The men of Israel went out of Mizpah and pursued the Philistines, and struck them down as far as below Beth-car.

esv.text: And the men of Israel went out from Mizpah and pursued the Philistines and struck them, as far as below Beth-car.

cnv.text: 於是以色列人從米斯巴出去，追趕非利士人，擊殺他們，直到伯．甲的下邊。

ccb.text: 以色列人从米斯巴一路追杀他们，直到伯·甲附近。
